description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The front features a large garage, a covered porch, and multiple windows, while the rear opens to a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, deck, and outdoor seating area. The exterior is primarily white with stone accents and large glass windows, giving it a contemporary appearance. The backyard is enclosed by a low wall and includes a round above-ground pool in addition to the main in-ground pool. The house has a mix of private and communal spaces, with visible rooms and hallways on both floors. The overall design emphasizes open space, natural light, and outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious backyard featuring a pool and deck. The exterior is white with stone accents and a prominent garage at the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, covered porch, main entryway, and multiple windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's length, window arrangement, and the backyard with a pool and lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, in-ground pool, deck, outdoor seating, and large glass doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side windows, backyard, and both pools.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with columns, steps, and a modern door adjacent to the garage.
